entry.title: New: RES26-002 (Honolulu) — Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.
entry.content:
REQUESTING THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI TO INCLUDE PEDESTRIAN SAFETY, BICYCLIST RIGHTS AND INTERACTIONS, AND MULTIMODAL ROADWAY USE AS PART OF THE DRIVER EDUCATION REQUIREMENTS.

Latest action: Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.

View on the council site
